name: chrYq12_heterochromatin_DYZ1_DYZ2
description: Y-chromosome q-arm heterochromatin block (Yq12), composed primarily of DYZ1 (HSat3-like, ~3.6 kb monomer) and DYZ2 (TTCCA/GAATG pentamer) tandem repeat arrays. Highly variable in size between individuals (10-40 Mb); largely a gap in GRCh38 and only resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: DYZ1 (~3.6 kb HSat3 unit) and DYZ2 (TTCCA pentamer) tandem arrays; extreme size polymorphism in the population; AT-rich, gene-poor.
